backend/main.mo: Main actor for the ICP backend defining all data types (Session, Document, Message, Community, etc.) and including storage/authorization mixins; serves as the primary canister entry point with migration support.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module defining old and new actor state shapes and a `run` function to transform persisted state when upgrading the canister, adding the community system to existing data.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping feature IDs and titles (community navigation, CommunityPage banner, stats bar, tab reordering, etc.) to their implementing source files, components, and test IDs with confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON-formatted catalogue of short summaries for each frontend source file, describing the purpose and notable changes (stubbed backend calls, type import fixes, Tailwind class corrections) of every component, hook, and utility.
frontend/docs/regression-test-plan-playe: Manual regression test plan covering player document creation, file/image uploads, privacy toggling, disabled states, error handling, and preview markup rendering across host and player roles.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, primary, chart colors, sidebar, etc.).
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point that mounts the React app at `#root`, includes an inline script for early dark-mode initialization from localStorage to prevent flash, and loads the Vite module entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component that manages authentication, user profile setup, session state, and navigation between the main lobby, communities hub, and individual community views.
frontend/src/components/app/AppErrorBoun: React error boundary component that catches unhandled runtime errors and displays a recovery UI with options to reload or clear local data.
frontend/src/components/app/StartupFailu: Full-screen error UI shown when the app fails to initialize, offering reload and clear-local-data recovery actions with an optional reason message.
frontend/src/components/chat/ChannelChat: Channel chat UI component that renders messages, a message input with image/sticker support, and reply functionality; most send actions are currently stubbed with toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/chat/ChatMessage: Renders a single chat message bubble supporting text, sticker, and GIF content, along with a local emoji reaction system and hover-triggered reaction picker.
frontend/src/components/chat/StickerMana: Panel for managing locally stored stickers, providing tabs to view/delete existing stickers and upload new ones via StickerUploadArea.
frontend/src/components/chat/StickerPick: Popup panel that displays the user's locally stored stickers in a grid and emits a selection callback when one is clicked.
frontend/src/components/chat/StickerUplo: A drag-and-drop/click-to-upload area for sticker images that processes the file using `processImageForSticker` and calls a callback with the result, showing loading and error states.
frontend/src/components/communities/Chat: A placeholder tab component displaying a 'Coming Soon' message for real-time community chat functionality.
frontend/src/components/communities/Comm: Renders a community banner with a background image or fallback gradient, overlaying the community name and description with a dark gradient for readability.
Displays a community as a card with a banner image, name, and an 'Open' button, styled using the community's primary and accent colors.

A multi-field form for creating or editing a community, including name, description, image pickers, privacy settings, join type, join questions, sub-places, and advanced customization, with live state propagation via an `onChange` callback.
A simple bar component that displays the community's active member count with an icon.
Renders a horizontally scrollable tab bar for community sections with drag-and-drop reordering support for authorized users, persisting order changes via a mutation.
Shows a live preview card of a community's theme, rendering the name, image, and a styled 'Join Community' button using the current theme settings from form data.
frontend/src/components/communities/Crea: A modal dialog for creating a new community by name, calling the backend actor and invoking a callback with the created community on success.
frontend/src/components/communities/fiel: A collapsible form section for advanced community theme customization, including primary/accent color pickers, background presets, and font selection with contrast warning support.
A form component for uploading and previewing community cover, icon, and banner images, with upload progress tracking and validation.
A form editor component for managing up to 3 custom join questions for a community, supporting add, edit, and remove operations.
A form editor component for managing up to 5 community sub-places, each with a name and type (Chat, Documents, or RPG).
frontend/src/components/communities/Home: Displays the community home feed with a post composer and a list of posts fetched via a query hook, showing skeletons while loading and an empty state when there are no posts.
frontend/src/components/communities/Host: A button component that opens the HostControlsDialog for editing community settings, displaying a settings icon with an 'Edit' label.

A dialog for host/admin community settings including banner image upload, primary/accent color pickers, font selection, and a member permissions tab, with save functionality via useUpdateCommunitySettings.
frontend/src/components/communities/Lore: A placeholder tab component displaying a 'Coming Soon' message for community lore entries.
frontend/src/components/communities/Memb: Displays a list of community members with toggles to grant or revoke tab-reorder permissions, using useGetMemberTabReorderPermissions and useUpdateMemberTabReorderPermission hooks.
frontend/src/components/communities/Poll: A placeholder tab component displaying a 'Coming Soon' message for community polls and voting.
frontend/src/components/communities/Post: A form component for creating community posts with text input and optional image upload, submitting via useCreateCommunityPost with upload progress tracking.
Renders a single community post card showing the author's avatar, name, timestamp, text content, and optional image.
frontend/src/components/communities/Quiz: A placeholder tab component displaying a 'Coming Soon' message for community quizzes and trivia.
frontend/src/components/communities/Rule: A placeholder tab component displaying a 'Coming Soon' message for community rules and guidelines.
frontend/src/components/docs/DocumentCom: A comments section component for documents that supports adding, displaying, and deleting comments with author display names and delete confirmation dialogs.
frontend/src/components/docs/DocumentCon: A read-only document content renderer that parses text with embedded file markers and displays inline images or downloadable file attachments.
frontend/src/components/docs/DocumentEdi: A document editor view with preview/edit toggle, file and image upload support, lock status display, and a comments section, though save and upload actions are currently disabled.
frontend/src/components/docs/ImageUpload: A dialog component for uploading images with a title, validating file type (jpg, png, gif, webp) and size (max 10MB) before calling the provided onUpload callback.
frontend/src/components/docs/PlayerDocum: A full editor view for player documents supporting content editing, save/visibility toggling, file uploads, image insertion via markers, and a preview mode with comments section.
frontend/src/components/profile/Avatar.t: A reusable avatar component that displays a user image or falls back to initials, supporting sm/md/lg sizes.
frontend/src/components/profile/ProfileP: A profile picture upload section that validates image files, shows a preview, and exposes callbacks for image change and removal with upload progress display.
frontend/src/components/profile/QuickCha: A dialog for setting a locally-stored quick chat profile with a display name and avatar image, supporting save and clear actions.
frontend/src/components/session/ChannelM: Provides dialogs and dropdown menu items for creating, renaming, and deleting session channels, with all mutating operations currently stubbed out as unavailable.
frontend/src/components/session/Document: Provides dialog components for creating, renaming, deleting, and locking/unlocking session documents, though all mutating operations are currently stubbed out with placeholder messages.
frontend/src/components/session/HostSess: Renders a dropdown button for hosts to export or import a session as JSON, with both operations currently stubbed out with toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/session/MembersC: Provides dialogs and dropdown menu items for creating, renaming, and deleting members' channels within a session, using real mutation hooks.
frontend/src/components/session/PlayerDo: Exports a dialog for creating player-owned documents (with privacy toggle) and a dropdown menu component for renaming, deleting, and toggling visibility of existing player documents.
Displays a dialog listing all player documents for a session with ownership indicators, and allows opening the create-document dialog to add new ones.
frontend/src/components/session/SessionD: Displays a dialog listing all session-level documents with lock indicators, and allows opening the create-document dialog via DocumentManagementDialogs.
frontend/src/components/session/SessionS: Renders the session sidebar with two sections—host channels and members channels—each supporting selection, creation (host only), and management via dropdown menus.
frontend/src/components/settings/PreLobb: Settings view shown before joining a session, allowing users to configure theme, background image, default nickname, profile picture, and a session template import/clear.
frontend/src/components/settings/UIScale: Popover component with a slider and number input for adjusting the UI scale percentage (10–200%), persisting the value via the preferences hook.
frontend/src/config/polling.ts: Exports named polling interval constants (in milliseconds) for messages, lists, session info, and document content.
React context provider that loads, persists, and exposes user preferences (including theme application to the DOM) via updatePreferences and reset helpers.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
Hook that monitors the actor query state and sets a startup-failed flag if the backend errors or exceeds a 15-second initialization timeout.
frontend/src/hooks/useCommunityImageUplo: Hook that uploads an image file as an ExternalBlob, tracks upload progress, and returns the resulting direct URL along with loading/error state.
frontend/src/hooks/useDocumentComments.t: Stub hooks for document comment CRUD operations that return empty/error responses gracefully because the backend methods are not yet available.
frontend/src/hooks/useDocumentFiles.ts: Stub hooks for listing, fetching, and uploading document file references that return empty/error responses because the backend methods are not yet available.
frontend/src/hooks/useDocumentImages.ts: Stub hooks for listing and adding images to session or player documents that return empty/error responses because the backend methods are not yet available.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status.
frontend/src/hooks/useLocalStickers.ts: React hook that loads, adds, and removes stickers from local storage, exposing the sticker list and loading state.
frontend/src/hooks/usePlayerDocuments.ts: Stub hooks for player document CRUD operations using React Query; all mutations return a 'Not available' error since the backend methods are not implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/usePolling.ts: Generic React hook that repeatedly calls a callback at a given interval using setInterval, with support for enabling/disabling polling.
frontend/src/hooks/usePreferences.ts: Re-exports the usePreferences hook from PreferencesContext for backwards compatibility.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for community-related backend operations including fetching communities, tabs, posts, and updating community settings via the actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useQuickChatProfile.t: React hook that manages a quick chat profile in local storage, providing load, save, and clear operations with state synchronization.
frontend/src/hooks/useSessionData.ts: Stub hooks for session, channel, and message data fetching and mutations using React Query; all queries return empty data since the RPG backend methods are unavailable.
frontend/src/hooks/useSessionDocuments.t: Stub hooks for session document CRUD operations using React Query; all mutations return a 'Not available' error since the backend methods are not implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserDisplayName.ts: React Query hook that fetches a user's display name from their profile via the actor, falling back to a shortened principal string.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserProfile.ts: React Query hooks for fetching and saving user profiles via the actor, including stubs for the unavailable remove-profile-picture backend method.
frontend/src/hooks/useViewportHeight.ts: React hook that tracks the current viewport height in pixels, listening to resize and orientation change events including the Visual Viewport API for mobile keyboard support.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, defines a cosmic dark theme via CSS custom properties (OKLCH), and provides utility styles for scrollbars, message bubbles, reaction badges, and community cards.
frontend/src/lib/clearLocalAppData.ts: Exports a utility function that removes specific app-related localStorage keys and clears sessionStorage to reset local application state.
frontend/src/lib/colorContrast.ts: Provides WCAG-based color contrast utilities including luminance calculation, contrast ratio comparison, and a helper that returns a warning string when text/background contrast falls below the AA threshold.
frontend/src/lib/communityTheme.ts: Defines default community theme values, font and background preset options, and helper functions to apply a CommunityTheme to a DOM element or generate card border styles.
frontend/src/lib/documentFileMarkers.ts: Handles serialization and parsing of [FILE:id:filename] markers embedded in document content, with helpers to create, parse, insert, and remove them.
frontend/src/lib/documentImageMarkers.ts: Handles serialization and parsing of [IMAGE:id:caption] markers embedded in document content, with helpers to create, parse, insert, and remove them.
frontend/src/lib/documentPreviewMarkup.t: Provides React-based document preview rendering, including tokenization of file markers, line-prefix markup parsing (center, big, heading, tiny), and inline markup rendering for spoilers and underlines.
frontend/src/lib/gifUrlValidation.ts: Exports functions to validate that a URL is a direct .gif link and to extract the first GIF URL found within a text string.
frontend/src/lib/imageValidation.ts: Exports constants and helpers for validating image file type (PNG/JPG) and size (≤5 MB), converting a File to a Uint8Array, and creating an object URL preview.
frontend/src/lib/myCommunitiesHiddenStor: Manages a localStorage-persisted set of hidden community IDs, exposing load, save, add, remove, and clear operations.
frontend/src/lib/preferencesStorage.ts: Manages user preferences (theme, background, nickname, UI scale) in localStorage with load, save, and reset helpers that enforce valid value ranges.
frontend/src/lib/quickChatProfileStorage: Persists and retrieves a quick-chat profile (display name and avatar data URL) in localStorage, with validation of structure, data URL format, and size limits.
frontend/src/lib/rollCommand.ts: Exports a parseRollCommand function that validates dice-roll pattern strings (e.g., 2d6+3), checking for required 'd' notation and allowed characters.
frontend/src/lib/sessionExportFile.ts: Provides utilities to serialize a SessionExport into a versioned JSON Blob for download and to parse/validate an imported JSON file back into a SessionExport.
frontend/src/lib/sessionStorage.ts: Provides utility functions to save, load, and clear RPG session context (sessionId, nickname, isHost) in localStorage.
frontend/src/lib/stickerImageProcessor.t: Processes uploaded image files into 128x128 PNG stickers via canvas cropping, and provides a helper to convert data URLs to Uint8Array.
frontend/src/lib/stickerStorage.ts: Manages a localStorage-backed collection of user stickers with load, save, add, remove, and clear operations, enforcing a 50-sticker limit.
Handles saving, loading, clearing, and validating a single SessionExport template in localStorage for session history reuse.
frontend/src/lib/time.ts: Exports two functions to format bigint nanosecond timestamps into human-readable relative strings (e.g., '5m ago') and full locale date/time strings.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/CommunitiesHubPage.ts: Page component displaying a user's communities with search, tab navigation between 'my' and 'discover' views, and a dialog to create new communities.
frontend/src/pages/CommunityPage.tsx: Page component rendering a single community with its banner, stats, themed tab navigation, and tab-specific content (Home, Chat, Lore, Polls, Quizzes, Rules).
frontend/src/pages/LobbyPage.tsx: Page component allowing users to host or join an RPG session by entering a name/nickname/password, with a settings shortcut and logout option.
frontend/src/pages/SessionPage.tsx: Main page component for an RPG session that manages view state (channel, player document, session document), renders a sidebar, and conditionally displays chat or document editor views based on user selection.
frontend/src/types/community.ts: TypeScript type definitions for community entities including Community, CommunityTheme, SubPlace, and CommunityFormData with privacy, join, and layout options.
frontend/src/types/session.ts: TypeScript type definitions for RPG session entities such as Session, Channel, Message, PlayerDocument, Document, and related response/utility types used throughout the session feature.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with a cosmic/RPG color palette, custom fonts, animations, gradients, and enabling the animate, typography, and container-queries plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing the current feature set, architectural notes, and known issues for a community platform app with a dark cosmic/RPG theme, community pages, and tab-based navigation.
